description_long: This house features a modern, single-story design with a flat roof and a spacious outdoor area. The front yard includes a tiled patio with a circular swimming pool and a round hot tub, bordered by a row of lush green plants. The main structure has a covered terrace with an outdoor dining area and a bar, partially enclosed by glass railings. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of white and neutral tones, with a high privacy wall on two sides. The entryway is accessible via a set of steps leading up from the sidewalk, and the overall layout emphasizes open, functional outdoor living. Large windows and sliding doors connect the indoor and outdoor spaces, enhancing natural light and accessibility.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, tiled patio, swimming pool, hot tub, and a covered outdoor dining area, surrounded by privacy walls and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tiled patio, swimming pool, hot tub, greenery, and the main entry with steps and glass railings.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the tall privacy wall and a partial glimpse of the roof and terrace area.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the solid privacy wall, flat roof, and the back of the patio area.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the pool, hot tub, greenery, and the covered terrace with outdoor dining space.
attribute_window_arrangement: large sliding doors and windows, asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with steps, glass railing, and a covered terrace; minimalistic and open design with no ornate features.
